description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a low, angular profile with a heavily armored exterior, primarily finished in dark gray with gold and yellow highlights. The vehicle is equipped with four large, rugged tires designed for urban and off-road mobility, and its body is reinforced with visible armor plating along the sides, front, and rear. A prominent weapon mount is situated on the roof, holding a large, forward-facing cannon or gun with additional detailing in yellow and green. The windows are small and reinforced, suggesting protection against ballistic threats, while the overall design emphasizes both defense and offensive capability. The front and rear bumpers are reinforced with metal bars, and the vehicle's surface shows a matte, slightly worn finish. The design is reminiscent of modern urban combat vehicles, blending aggressive styling with practical defensive features.
description: A heavily armored, low-profile combat tactical vehicle with a roof-mounted cannon, reinforced bumpers, and large rugged tires, finished in dark gray with gold accents. Its design emphasizes both protection and offensive capability for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, highlighting the angular armor plating, large tires, and the prominent roof-mounted weapon.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the reinforced bumper, narrow armored windows, and the forward-facing cannon on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the weapon mount and rear tire details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the armored back, rear bumper reinforcement, and the back of the roof-mounted weapon.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large weapon mount on the roof, centrally positioned, holding a forward-facing cannon or gun.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with visible reinforcement on the sides, front, and rear; appears thick and angular, with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray with gold and yellow accent lines; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, rugged tires with deep tread pattern suitable for off-road and urban terrain; appear reinforced.
